behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names superset/security/manager.py, the register_views() method, and the SupersetSecurityManager class, which covers all the specifics tests check.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (unconditional registration conflicts) without prescribing the exact fix mechanism like class attribute names.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only require that auth_view and registeruser_view assignments be inside an if block - any conditional approach (class attr, config flag, hasattr check) would pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover conditional registration, syntax validity, ruff linting, and compilation of security dir as described in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively and have docstrings, with helper functions separated out.
